2146910.name: Wayward Strand Soundtrack
2146910.description:
This is the original soundtrack to the 2022 released videogame Wayward Strand.

It's been a massive journey since 2016, making this game!

This album includes most of the music from the game, in their full expanded forms. When my music makes it in to the game, it often gets chopped up in to little pieces! And things get taken out, for it to fit neatly with all the rest of the audio happening. In this soundtrack release, you'll hear lots that didn't make it in the game. All in its full glory!

A special thanks to those who gave mix feedback on tracks or the whole album:
Tfer Newsome
Kwamena Brace
And my amazing cheerleaders from the Wayward Strand team, who've been listening to the same music for almost 7 years but only seem fonder of it <3
